guest: Craig Clements, billion-dollar marketer and CEO

business_ideas.idea: Privacy services for executives and high-net-worth individuals

predictions.text: Video will become the primary system of record replacing text and databases
Privacy concerns will drive demand for executive-focused security products

dynamics: Craig delivers masterclass presentation on marketing frameworks with Sam as engaged student. Minimal back-and-forth; Craig lectures extensively with historical examples and case studies. Format intentionally one-directional.
frameworks: 7 Human Hijacks: Make it about them, Make it an event, Powerful demonstration, Unquestionable proof, Change daily behavior, Sell the dream, Help them rebel/feel superior
3 stages of product market: Clueless (no awareness), Curious (some awareness), Saturation (commoditized)
The Mario Marketing framework - sell customer transformation not product features
Goldfish attention span - humans exposed to 4000 ads/day, must grab attention immediately
learnings: Successful marketing hijacks the limbic system making behavior feel involuntary and natural
Demonstrations with proof more powerful than claims - people want to see it happen
Powerful demonstrations stick in memory for decades (still remember 'brain on drugs egg' from 20 years ago)
Marketers have historically created most daily behaviors people take for granted
Fear and education combined create viral content when addressing perceived threats

banger_quotes.quote: Marketers created all of that - referencing daily behaviors
Have you tried solving the problem by solving the problem
Nothing attracts a crowd like a crowd
Don't sell the fire flower, sell little Mario becoming big Mario

numbers_dropped: Pepsodent increased daily brushing from 5% to 85% within a decade
Otis elevator sold 2000 elevators over a decade after Crystal Palace demonstration
Craig's probiotic ad reached approximately 100 million people in 4 months
Shadow work journal sold 500K+ copies in 2.5-3 months via TikTok shop
4000 ads per day exposure for average person
Dr. Oz-driven Garcinia Cambogia generated billions in sales across platforms
notable: Rare masterclass format where one guest teaches extensively; focus on historical marketing case studies and ethical implications of persuasion techniques
